form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up finished sixth of 7 runners at Lingfield All Weather on February 21 over 2400m, 7 len behind Paradias with 58kg at $4.30. Second-up finished 12th of 22 runners at Cheltenham on March 10 over 3300m, 20 len behind Saratoga with 71.5kg at $13. Disappointing that day and likely to struggle again.

form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Comes off a 55 day let-up. Last run favourite; won by 1.75 len Chepstow on February 13 over 3200m on rain affected going defeating Mwabani with 74.5kg at $2.80 in a hurdle. Before that to post a big 4.5 len win. Lingfield on December 21 over 3200m defeating Network Gold with 73kg at $1.70 in a hurdle. Needs a lot more in this company.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start finished second of 20 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Triumph Hurdle on March 13 over 3400m, on slow going 1.5 len behind Apolon De Charnie carrying 71kg at $6. The start before that; ran on from midfield and won by 2 len Cheltenham in a G2 Finesse Juvenile Novices' Hurdle on January 24 over 3400m slow going defeating One Horse Town carrying 71kg at $3.50 in a jumps. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months finished third of 20 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Triumph Hurdle on March 13 over 3400m, slow track; 1.5 len behind Apolon De Charnie carrying 71kg at $8. Previously second-up won by 0.8 len Wetherby in a LR on October 31 over 3200m defeating Ammes with 70kg at $9 in a hurdle. Rates strongly and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation finished third of 7 runners at Leopardstown in the G1 Spring Juvenile Hurdle on February 2 over 3218m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Narciso Has carrying 66.5kg at $2.90. Won previous preparation first up to post a big 4 len win. Down Royal on November 1 over 3419m defeating Wizard Of Odds with 68.5kg at $1.50 in a hurdle. Sure to make her presence felt.
